metas.name: Youjo Senki II
metas.description: Genres: Action, Fantasy Tags:Military/War/Age Regression/Female Protagonist/Isekai/Anti-Hero/Guns/Magic/Religion/Politics/Foreign/Revenge/Gods/Gender Bending/Historical/Primarily Adult Cast/Primarily Male Cast/Tanks/Femboy/Assassins The second season of Youjo Senki.

metas.name: Mushoku Tensei III: Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu
metas.description: Genres: Adventure, Drama, Ecchi, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist/Coming of Age/Isekai/Family Life/Magic/Heterosexual/Polyamorous/Swordplay/Medieval/Female Harem/Gods/Demons/Primarily Adult Cast/Elf/Disability/Politics/Love Triangle/Maids/Amnesia/Kemonomimi/College/Delinquents The third season of Mushoku Tensei: Isekai Ittara Honki Dasu.

metas.name: BLEACH: Sennen Kessen-hen - Kashin-tan
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Supernatural Tags:Shounen/Male Protagonist/Swordplay/Gods/War/Urban Fantasy/Super Power/Gore The fourth and final part of BLEACH: Sennen Kessen-hen.

metas.name: Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten
metas.description:
Genres: Mahou Shoujo Tags:Magic/Female Protagonist/Primarily Female Cast/Philosophy/Witch/Super Power/Urban Fantasy/Kuudere/Guns/Curses The 10th anniversary online event for the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica anime revealed that the franchise is getting a new anime film titled Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Walpurgis no Kaiten. The film will be an official sequel to the Mahou Shoujo Madoka☆Magica: Hangyaku no Monogatari film that opened in October 2013. The tagline on the new film's visual reads, "Now, let's continue the story."

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

metas.name: Otomege Sekai wa Mob ni Kibishii Sekai desu 2
metas.description: Genres: Action, Fantasy, Mecha, Romance Tags:Isekai/Female Harem/Parody/Male Protagonist/Anti-Hero/Primarily Teen Cast/School/Magic/Robots The second season of Otomege Sekai wa Mob ni Kibishii Sekai desu.

metas.name: Grand Blue Season 3
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life, Sports Tags:Foreign/Surreal Comedy The third season of Grand Blue.

metas.name: Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu II
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy Tags:Skeleton/Medieval/Isekai/Male Protagonist/Magic/Swordplay The second season of Gaikotsu Kishi-sama, Tadaima Isekai e Odekakechuu.

metas.name: Super no Ura de Yani Suu Futari
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance, Slice of Life Tags:Seinen/Iyashikei/Heterosexual/Konbini/Work/Primarily Adult Cast/Urban At age forty-five, office worker Sasaki has had enough of the corporate grind. His only solace is smoking-and the friendly smile of supermarket cashier Yamada. When Sasaki can't find Yamada after a particularly trying day, a striking woman invites him to smoke with her. The despondent man thinks he's made a new smoking buddy in the cool, teasing Tayama, but Sasaki doesn't realize he already knows her!

(Source: Square Enix)

Note: Episodes 1-6 had an early release by ABEMA and Crunchyroll on June 3rd, 2026 in a mini-episode batch format that splits 6 episodes into 12, ahead of the TV broadcast which starts on July 2nd, 2026.

metas.name: Kimi ga Shinu made Koi wo Shitai
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Fantasy, Romance Tags:War/Yuri/Primarily Female Cast/Magic/Primarily Teen Cast/Female Protagonist/School/LGBTQ+ Themes/Gore/Orphan At the mysterious orphanage where Sheena lives, death is nothing new to its residents—girls who no longer have families of their own, who are raised as weapons of war, taught to kill and take the lives of others without batting an eye. Everyone, that is, except Sheena, who wishes for nothing more than the growing conflict around her to end. On the night of her roommate's death, Sheena meets a strange girl covered in blood, who smiles despite the turmoil surrounding them. The next day, the girl appears as a new student in Sheena's class and introduces herself as Mimi. Initially thought to be a school myth, there are now whispers in the orphanage's halls that Mimi is their secret weapon—an immortal who cannot die. When Mimi is later assigned as Sheena's new roommate, Sheena's world grows even more complicated when she begins living with someone who loves and welcomes death, when all Sheena wants to do is stop it…

(Source: Kodansha USA)

metas.name: Clevatess II: Majuu no Ou to Itsuwari no Yuusha Denshou
metas.description: Genres: Action, Drama, Fantasy Tags:Medieval/Magic/Female Protagonist The second season of Clevatess: Majuu no Ou to Akago to Kabane no Yuusha.

metas.name: Kimi no Koto ga Dai Dai Dai Dai Daisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo 3rd Season
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Ecchi, Romance Tags:Female Harem/Polyamorous/Primarily Female Cast/Primarily Teen Cast/Slapstick/School/Male Protagonist/Heterosexual The third season of Kimi no Koto ga Dai Dai Dai Dai Daisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo.

metas.name: Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru II
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist/Teacher/Swordplay The second season of Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru.

metas.name: Seihantai na Kimi to Boku 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Drama, Romance, Slice of Life Tags:Heterosexual/Iyashikei/Ensemble Cast/School/Primarily Teen Cast/Male Protagonist/Female Protagonist/Shounen The second season of Seihantai na Kimi to Boku.

metas.name: Koukaku Kidoutai: THE GHOST IN THE SHELL
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Psychological, Sci-Fi Tags:Philosophy/Cyberpunk/Cyborg/Artificial Intelligence/Robots/Guns/Urban/Female Protagonist/Seinen/Primarily Adult Cast Ghost in the Shell is a landmark work of cyberpunk science fiction set in a near-future when information networks envelop the world and highly advanced cyborg augmentation technology has enabled the creation of the cyberbrain. It follows the story of the full-body cyborg Motoko Kusanagi and the combat force she leads in the fight against cybercrime.

(Source:攻殻機動隊 THE GHOST IN THE SHELL Site)

metas.name: Nige Jouzu no Wakagimi 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure Tags:Samurai/War/Historical/Male Protagonist/Gore/Shounen/Primarily Male Cast The second season of Nige Jouzu no Wakagimi.

metas.name: Nijuuseiki Denki Mokuroku: Eureka・Evrika
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Romance Tags:Historical/Steampunk/Heterosexual/Female Protagonist The novel takes place in the summer of 1907, the 40th year of the Meiji era. 15-year-old Inako Momokawa lives in the Fushimi area of Kyoto, and is the second daughter of a sake brewer. Nothing she does ever comes out right, and she receives a scolding from her father every day. Her only relief is the trust she places in her prayers to the gods. One day while at Fushimi Inari shrine, she meets a freewheeling young man named Kihachi Sakamoto. He rejects the gods, and boasts of the incoming age of electricity.

The topic of marriage suddenly comes up in Inako's household. Her father is one-sidedly making all the decisions for her, and Inako is about to give up hope. It is then that Kihachi draws out Inako's true feelings of wanting to run away from her family. The only way to stop her marriage is to find an unusual book called the "Electricity Catalog." The book is a prediction book about electricity that Kihachi wrote when he was a child, but his older brother Seiroku took the book, and its current whereabouts are unknown. Inako and Kihachi together go in search of the book across Kyoto and Shiga prefectures.

(Source: Anime News Network)

metas.name: BLACK TORCH
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Sci-Fi, Supernatural Tags:Urban Fantasy/Youkai/Shounen/Ninja/Male Protagonist/Demons Although he may appear rough-and-tumble, Jiro Azuma’s compassionate side emerges when it comes to the furry critters he can communicate with. But Jiro's soft spot for animals gets him in major trouble when a suspicious stray cat fuses with him, granting him exceptional power but also dragging him into humanity's hidden battle against powerful Japanese spirits, mononoke.

(Source: VIZ Media)

metas.name: Tsuihou Sareta Tensei Juukishi wa Game Chishiki de Musou Suru
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist/Isekai/Dungeon Born into a prestigious family of master swordsmen, Elymas Edvaughn’s future shatters when he awakens the so-called “defective” Heavy Knight class. Disowned and cast out, he regains memories of another life—and realizes this world mirrors a VR game he once mastered. Armed with knowledge no one else possesses, he sets out to rewrite his fate and prove the strength of the “weakest” class.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

metas.name: SEKIRO: NO DEFEAT
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Supernatural Tags:Swordplay/Samurai/Ninja/War/Historical/Youkai/Martial Arts/Male Protagonist/Primarily Male Cast/Primarily Adult Cast The time is Sengoku.

Japan is fractured into many independent nations entangled in ceaseless war. At the center lies Ashina, a land of sacred earth and ancient mystery. Two decades after Sword Saint Isshin Ashina reclaimed the region in a brutal coup, a new threat emerges from within: The Interior Ministry. Desperate to protect his homeland, Isshin's grandson Genichiro turns to forbidden powers. The only hope lies in a kidnapped boy — the Divine Heir — and his silent protector: a loyal shinobi known only as Sekiro.

This is the story of a lord and his retainer — and their quest to restore balance to a nation on the edge.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

metas.name: Tai-Ari deshita.: Ojou-sama wa Kakutou Game nante Shinai
metas.description:
Genres: Drama Tags:Video Games/Female Protagonist/Yuri/Ojou-sama/Primarily Female Cast/LGBTQ+ Themes/Boarding School/E-Sports/Cute Girls Doing Cute Things/Seinen Kuromi Girls’ Academy is a refined, elegant school that expects the very best in deportment from its young ladies. Aya got into this peerless rich-girls’ institution on a scholarship, and hopes to grow as lovely as her fellow student and idol Shirayui. But Shirayui hides a terrible secret: she’s a trash-talking, combo-chaining, newbie-stomping, ruthless hardcore gamer! Could a mutual indulgence in no-holds-barred video game combat grow into a deeper rapport between these two girls?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Hell Mode: Yarikomi-zuki no Gamer wa Haisettei no Isekai de Musou Suru 2nd Season
metas.description: Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Isekai/Creature Taming/Male Protagonist The second season of Hell Mode.

metas.name: Tenmaku no Jaadugar
metas.description:
Genres: Drama Tags:Female Protagonist/Royal Affairs/Historical/Biographical/Indigenous Cultures/Politics/Kingdom Management/Foreign/Josei/Slavery/Religion Eight centuries ago, in the latter days of the Islamic golden age, a young girl arrived in the Khwarazmian city of Tus. She was a slave. But she learned.

Eight centuries ago, the Mongols blazed across the map, swept Khwarazm into the ash heap of history, and took all they desired from the ruins. They took the girl who learned.

So begins the true story of how a “witch,” wielding knowledge as her only weapon, came to hold the greatest empire the world has ever known in the palm of her hand…

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Futsutsuka na Akujo de wa Gozaimasu ga: Suuguu Chouso Torikae Den
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Romance Tags:Josei/Female Protagonist/Magic/Royal Affairs/Foreign/Historical/Villainess/Ancient China As maidens from the Five Clans battle for the Crown Prince’s heart, jealous Keigetsu uses forbidden magic to swap bodies with the beloved Reirin. Switching places does not guarantee happiness for Keigetsu with her new body's ill health leaving her hanging on the verge of death. Meanwhile, Reirin, now wearing the face of a scorned outcast, must answer for Keigetsu’s crimes in a dangerous trial.

The unlikely pair become increasingly entangled in each other’s lives and they will need to work together to survive after discovering the dark conspiracies brewing beneath the palace's genial surface. To confront the deadly threats lurking in the shadows, Reirin must embrace her new identity and defy their expectations of the court's inept villainess.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

metas.name: ONE PIECE HEROINES
metas.description:
Genres: Tags:Pirates/Primarily Female Cast/Fashion/Female Protagonist Based on the novel series ONE PIECE novel HEROINES, one chapter, “episode : NAMI” is getting an anime adaptation.

After buying poorly made shoes, Nami returns to the shop and meets Lebno, the designer. He offers to create a new pair from scratch, on the condition that she becomes his model. However, the craftsperson Miucha is the one who does the work.

(Source: Toei Animation Europe)

metas.name: Yani Neko
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life Tags:Drugs/Nekomimi/Female Protagonist/Kemonomimi/Urban/Primarily Female Cast/Hikikomori/Primarily Adult Cast Yani is a catgirl with a seriously bad smoking habit. She smokes so much that her apartment smells like ash and is littered with cigarette butts—and plenty of other trash! Every time she tries to quit, she becomes weak to the cravings and gives in almost instantly. Will she ever get her life together, or is she doomed to live as a chainsmoking slob forever?

(Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

metas.name: Boku no Hero Academia: I am a hero too
metas.description:
Genres: Tags:Female Protagonist/Urban Fantasy/Super Power/Superhero/Shounen Following the broadcast of My Hero Academia Episode 170+1, the series' official website and accounts revealed that a new short anime adapting the "I Am a Hero Too" bonus chapter will tell the story of Eri as a high-schooler when it releases this summer.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

metas.name: Saijo no Osewa: Takane no Hanadarake na Meimonkou de, Gakuin Ichi no Ojou-sama (Seikatsu Nouryoku Kaimu) wo Kagenagara Osewa suru Koto ni Narimashita
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance Tags:Heterosexual A poor high school boy, Itsuki Tomonari, got caught up in a kidnapping attempt on Hinako Konohana, a young lady from one of Japan's largest conglomerates. On the surface, Hinako appears to be a brilliant and beautiful young woman, but in reality, she is a lazy girl with no life skills. However, due to family reasons, Hinako has to play the role of the "perfect young lady" at school. Wanting to protect her, Itsuki took on the job of caring for her. Eventually, Hinako began to spoil Itsuki with all her might -- "I don't want...... Itsuki to leave my side right now." This is a love story that begins beyond the master-servant relationship featuring a princess with a beautiful facade.

(Source: HJ Bunko, translated)

metas.name: Sayonara Lara
metas.description:
Genres: Supernatural Tags:Fairy Tale/Coastal/Mermaid/Female Protagonist/Primarily Female Cast All because of "love"

Announced and revealed at Anime Central 2024's "Kinema Citrus Sweet 16: My Happy Marriage and What's New" panel, this anime follows a mermaid who makes a forbidden wish to be loved by a human. Following her death, she is reborn 200 years later into modern-day Japan in Lake Biwa, where she learns to adjust in a human world.

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

metas.name: Tenkousaki no Seiso Karen na Bishoujo ga, Mukashi Danshi to Omotte Issho ni Asonda Osananajimi datta Ken
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance Tags:Tomboy/Heterosexual/Male Protagonist/School I met my childhood friend again, and she had become a beautiful and innocent girl.

"It's been a while, Hayato."
"Haruki, is it?"

In the past, I used to play in the mud with my childhood friend in the countryside, and when I saw him again, there was no trace of the bratty young man I thought he was back then. Only in front of Hayato, she threw away the coat she was wearing and reacted in the same crass way she did back then. The distance between you and me has not changed.

(Source: Shousetsuka ni Narou, translated)

metas.name: World Is Dancing
metas.description:
Genres: Drama Tags:Dancing/Historical/Acting/Coming of Age/Male Protagonist Born into a life of acting and dance with a traveling theater troupe in 14th-century Japan, 12-year old Oniyasha has one problem—he doesn't know what the point of any of it is. "Why must I step with the left foot here instead of the right? Why is one performance good and another, bad? Why do people dance at all?" It all seems perfectly arbitrary, until a chance encounter in a run-down shack sets him down a path to revolutionizing the art form and influencing much of Japanese culture to come. A fictionalized account of the early life of Zeami Motokiyo (Oniyasha), the founder of modern Noh theater—the world's oldest surviving theater art—this coming-of-age artist's journey vividly brings to life a man far ahead of his time during one of Japan's most culturally and socially vibrant eras.

(Source: Kodansha Comics)

metas.name: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44:CLOUDY BEACH
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Drama, Mystery, Thriller Tags:Female Protagonist/Death Game/Primarily Female Cast/Coastal Theatrical follow-up to Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu.

This is the story of a certain insane world.

Player name: Yuuki. Occupation: Professional in deadly games.

Overcoming the jinx known as the "Thirty Game Wall," which drastically reduces the survival rate of players, Yuuki continues her journey. A game where death is always close at hand. Next, she takes on a remote island in the middle of the ocean. Eight players have gathered there. Among them are seasoned veterans whom Yuuki knows. The game is "Cloudy Beach." Beyond the wall, only those who have crossed the wall remain. Today, once again, she makes a living playing deadly games.

(Source: Official Site, translated)

metas.name: Toumei na Yoru ni Kakeru Kimi to, Me ni Mienai Koi wo Shita.
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Romance Tags:Heterosexual/Disability/Primarily Adult Cast/College On an April night in Tokyo, still too early for fireworks, university student Kakeru Sorano meets a woman named Koharu Fuyutsuki. She is a beautiful girl who stands out from the crowd, laughs a lot, and exudes a warmth that contrasts sharply with Kakeru's own introversion. But there was something Kakeru didn't know at first—she can't see.

Unlike Kakeru, Koharu hasn't given up on anything, even with her blindness. She attends university daily, shows interest in clubs, makes friends—and dreams of launching fireworks one day. Kakeru wonders why, when she can't see them...but maybe it doesn't matter. And maybe he can start moving forward, too, for the girl who's always been by his side

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Koko wa Ore ni Makasete Saki ni Ike to Ittekara 10-nen ga Tattara Densetsu ni Natteita.
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist With no other options, Luck makes the choice to hold the line against the unending demonic hordes alone, to make sure his comrades can escape with their lives. However, through a combination of fortune, skill, and ingenuity, he holds that line for ten straight years, eventually coming out on top single handedly. Now he has to tackle the dilemma of how to occupy himself in a world where he holds a myriad of roles: that of a legend, that of a veteran, and that of a brand new face.

(Source: Comikey)

metas.name: Dogul Wang
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist/Anti-Hero/Magic/Gods/Demons/Dungeon/Surreal Comedy In the year 2025, mysterious tombs appeared all over the world, each housing an ancient relic granting supernatural abilities. The lucky few who quickly obtained these relics ruled over powerful monopolies. Others came to serve them, such as Jooheon Suh, a “raider” who hid in tombs to steal relics. Betrayed by his employer, Jooheon is left to die but instead finds himself transported 15 years in the past. Armed with years of tough raiding experience and knowledge of what is to come in the world of relics, does Jooheon have what it takes to become the “Tomb Raider King”?

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: LV999 no Murabito
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy Tags:Male Protagonist/Demons/Magic In this world, the concept of levels exist. Other than those who live off defeating monsters, most people are only around Level 1 to 5. What's more, not just anyone can go out to hunt monsters; it's heavily influenced by one's role anointed by god. There are eight such eligible roles. Warriors. Fighters. Clerics. Magicians. Rogues. Merchants. Hunters. Sorcerers. Those blessed with extraordinary power are divided into three types. Royalty. Heroes. Sages. But for the majority of the population, they have no such powers and live by farming or running shops. Towns are developed by those with the weakest role…Villagers.

For the powerless Villagers going out to hunt monsters is equivalent to committing suicide. But one day, a certain two-year-old child given the role of Villager notices something.

Once you defeat a monster… you can earn great wealth.

metas.name: Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat Majutsushi Boukenroku
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Isekai/Magic Ephtal is reincarnated as a human, coming from modern Earth. In this new world where magic is real, he decides to devote the entirety of his life in the pursuit of magic. Despite his efforts, though, he discovers that he is absolutely talentless in magic, and breathed his last in anguish....But it isn't the end for him just yet! He reincarnates once again bearing the same name, Ephtal, 400 years later. Having retained his knowledge and power, he steals his resolve and once again sets his sights for the peak of magic!

(Source: Comikey)

metas.name: Otome Kaijuu Caramelise
metas.description:
Genres: Comedy, Romance, Supernatural Tags:Heterosexual/Kaiju/Female Protagonist/Tokusatsu/Monster Girl/Shapeshifting Suffering from a rare, incurable illness that causes frightening changes to her body, loner Kuroe Akaishi spends her high school days avoiding all her classmates—especially class idol Arata Minami and his groupies. But when Arata starts making her heart skip a beat with irritating regularity, Kuroe discovers that her illness actually has a big—make that MONSTER—secret: Romance turns her into Love-zilla…literally!

(Source: Yen Press)

metas.name: Neko to Ryuu
metas.description:
Genres: Adventure, Fantasy Tags:Dragons/Animals/Anthropomorphism/Magic The story follows a fire-breathing, human-hating dragon raised by a mother cat in a forest. The dragon, known affectionately as "Uncle Wing," watches over the many curious cats — such as one that goes on an adventure with a human prince, and another that lives in the city and people-watches as a hobby — and gradually warms up to humans along the way.

(Source: Crunchyroll News)

metas.name: Ryoumin 0-Nin Start no Henkyou Ryoushu-sama
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance, Slice of Life Tags:Agriculture/Anthropomorphism/Kingdom Management/Cohabitation/Ensemble Cast/Family Life/Found Family/LGBTQ+ Themes/Gender Bending/Male Protagonist/Wilderness/Transgender Dias finally returns home after decades of war. He's hailed as a hero and promptly rewarded with his own domain...which turns out to be little more than empty plains. Population: zero. Dias, who has only ever known battle, finds himself at a loss. How is he supposed to survive, let alone cultivate his territory into a thriving, prosperous dominion when there's nothing but grass as far as can see?

Fortunately for Dias, a horned girl by the name of Alna is about to show him there's more to the plains than meets the eye!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metas.name: Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita.: Madousho no Chikara de Sokoku wo Tataki Tsubushimasu
metas.description:
Genres: Drama, Fantasy Tags:Female Protagonist/Revenge/Villainess/Shounen/Royal Affairs/Magic Elizabeth Leiston, daughter of the influential prime minister, is a picture-perfect lady on the path to becoming the future queen of the Kingdom of Haldoria. But her life takes a sudden turn for the worst when her fiancé makes a show of publicly calling off their engagement. Soon after, he throws her in jail and starts spreading nasty rumors about her. The encouragement Elizabeth receives from her loyal waiting maid, Mireille, and her inner fury are all she needs to reconsider her goals. Why should she continue devoting herself to a country that doesn’t respect her when she can trample over it instead? She will get even with those who wronged her and bring down the damned kingdom, even if it’s the last thing she does! Luckily, Elizabeth is no damsel in distress and has seven powerful magic grimoires she won’t hesitate to use. Get ready because this ruthless lady is out for blood!

(Source: J-Novel Club)

metas.name: Saikyou Degarashi Ouji no Anyaku Teii Arasoi: Munou wo Enjiru SS Rank Ouji wa Koui Keishou-sen wo Kage kara Shihai suru
metas.description:
Genres: Action, Comedy, Drama, Fantasy, Romance Tags:Heterosexual Arnold, the seventh Imperial Prince of the Adrasia Empire, is called "THE INSIPID PRINCE" among people since his twin brother is genius and respected by all people. However, he has a secret identity -SILVER, one of the only five -SS-rank adventurers in the continent. When his younger brother Leo decides to aim for the throne, Arnold starts running things behind the scenes to support his brother. Unexpectedly the most beautiful lady becomes his assistant. The secret struggle of the strongest prince begins!

(Source: Kadokawa)

metas.name: Bungou Stray Dogs Wan! 2
metas.description: Genres: Comedy, Slice of Life, Supernatural Tags:Chibi/Episodic/Primarily Adult Cast/Ensemble Cast The second season of Bungou Stray Dogs Wan!
